hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start by creating a list of all numbers from 2 up to the target

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a dictionary or object to track whether each number has been marked as not prime

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: For each unmarked number, mark all of its multiples as not prime

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use push() to build up the final list of primes

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Numbers that remain unmarked after processing are prime
